Profile

About Meera

Hey there! I'm M. Dharshini, but everyone calls me Meera. I'm a passionate first-year Cyber Security student who believes technology and art can coexist in the most beautiful ways.

I'm someone who debugs code in the morning and performs on stage at night. My world is a blend of neon terminals, dance floors, and big cinematic dreams. I love anime deeply — it taught me that the most unlikely heroes save the world.

Whether it's defending digital systems, expressing emotion through dance, or chasing my dream of becoming a cinema actress, I bring full intensity to everything I do.

My Dreams

🎬
Cinema Actress

The silver screen calls my name. I dream of telling powerful stories, becoming a character who inspires millions — just like the anime heroes who inspired me.

Cloud & Coding Pro

AWS, Azure, GCP — the cloud is my future playground. I want to architect digital systems that run the world, secured by my cyber expertise.

TARGET: CLOUD ARCHITECT

Cyber Security Expert

Becoming a guardian of the digital world. Ethical hacker. Security architect. The person organizations trust when everything is on the line.

PATH: ETHICAL HACKER

Tech Path

Cyber Security Journey

meera@cyberworld ~ terminal
$ whoami
→ M. Dharshini | Cyber Security Student
$ cat dreams.txt
→ Cloud Architect | Ethical Hacker
→ Cinema Actress | Dance Artist
$ ls skills/
→ cybersec/ cloud/ hacking/ dance/ coding/
$ ping future.career
→ Connecting to AWS...
→ REPLY from cloud: time=∞ms
$ sudo run anime --mode=naruto
→ Activating: Never Give Up Protocol 🍃
$ _
CHAPTER 01
The Spark
Discovered cyber security and realized the digital world needs protectors. Enrolled in my dream department.
CHAPTER 02
Foundation Building
Learning networking fundamentals, Linux basics, and the philosophy of ethical hacking. Every day is a new level unlocked.
CHAPTER 03
Cloud Curiosity
Fascinated by cloud architecture. AWS and Azure are on the horizon — the future of computing is distributed and secure.
CHAPTER ∞
The Future
Certified Cloud Security Professional, Ethical Hacker, and — why not — a Cinema Actress too. The story is still being written.
